Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWRECEITUARIO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName DDO_GridColumnsSelector.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName If &HTTPRequest.Method = HttpMethod.Get Do 'LoadSavedFilters' EndIf JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &RctSts1 = nullvalue(&RctSts1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RCTNUM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &RctSts2 = nullvalue(&RctSts2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RCTNUM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &RctSts3 = nullvalue(&RctSts3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RCTNUM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &AcoesData = new() &AcoesDataItem = new() &AcoesDataItem.Title = 'Gerar Arq Receita' &AcoesDataItem.EventKey = !'ArqSiagro' &AcoesDataItem.IsDivider = False &AcoesData.Add(&AcoesDataItem) &AcoesDataItem = new() &AcoesDataItem.Title = 'Gerar Arq Venda' &AcoesDataItem.EventKey = !'ArqSiagroVenda' &AcoesDataItem.IsDivider = False &AcoesData.Add(&AcoesDataItem) &AcoesDataItem = new() &AcoesDataItem.Title = 'Grava como transmitido' &AcoesDataItem.EventKey = !'Transmitido' &AcoesDataItem.IsDivider = False &AcoesData.Add(&AcoesDataItem) &RctFunCod = nullvalue(&RctFunCod) Form.Caption = ' Receituario' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() DDO_GridColumnsSelector.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnEditColumns.InternalName GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do Case Case &ManageFiltersExecutionStep = 1 &ManageFiltersExecutionStep = 2 Case &ManageFiltersExecutionStep = 2 &ManageFiltersExecutionStep = 0 Do 'LoadSavedFilters' EndCase Do 'SaveGridState' If &Session.Get(!'WWReceituarioColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'WWReceituarioColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf RctCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible RctNum.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible RctOciCliCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible RctOciCliNom.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible RctDta.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible RctNfeNum.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible RctOciCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible RctSts.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(8).IsVisible &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount RctSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &SdtReceituario.Clear() Do 'loadSelecionados' EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Alterar = !'' &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &ActionSelecione.TooltipText = "" &Acoes.Clear() &Acoes.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') If (RctSts = Status_Receituario.Digitando) &Acoes.AddItem(1, 'Finalizar Receita') Endif If (RctSts <> Status_Receituario.Transmitido) &Acoes.AddItem(2, 'Cancelar Receita') Endif If (RctSts <> Status_Receituario.Cancelado and RctSts <> Status_Receituario.Transmitido) &Acoes.AddItem(3, 'Abrir Receita') Endif If &Acoes.Count = 1 &Acoes.Class = !'Invisible' Else &Acoes.Class = !'Attribute' EndIf &EnviarEmail = !'' &ImprimirReceituario = !'' Do Case Case RctSts = Status_Receituario.Finalizado RctSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case RctSts = Status_Receituario.Cancelado RctSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Case RctSts = Status_Receituario.Transmitido RctSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case RctSts = Status_Receituario.Digitando RctSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Otherwise RctSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &RctSel = False &AuxRctCod = RctCod Do 'IsSelecionado' &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) if &RctSel = true &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) Endif EndEvent Event DDO_GridColumnsSelector.OnColumnsChanged /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState(!'WWReceituarioColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ddo_ManageFilters.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_ManageFilters.ActiveEventKey = !'<#Clean#>' Do 'CleanFilters' Grid.FirstPage() Case ddo_ManageFilters.ActiveEventKey = !'<#Save#>' Do 'SaveGridState' SaveFilterAs.Popup(!'WWReceituarioFilters', &PgmName + !"GridState") &ManageFiltersExecutionStep = 2 Refresh Case ddo_ManageFilters.ActiveEventKey = !'<#Manage#>' ManageFilters.Popup(!'WWReceituarioFilters') &ManageFiltersExecutionStep = 2 Refresh Otherwise &ManageFiltersXml = GetFilterByName(!'WWReceituarioFilters', ddo_ManageFilters.ActiveEventKey) If &ManageFiltersXml.IsEmpty() msg('WWP_FilterNotExist') Else Do 'CleanFilters' SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &ManageFiltersXml) &GridState.FromXml(&ManageFiltersXml) Do 'LoadRegFiltersState' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' Grid.FirstPage() EndIf EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &Acoes.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &Acoes = 1 Do 'Do Finalizar' Case &Acoes = 2 Do 'Do CancelaReceita' Case &Acoes = 3 Do 'Do Abrir' EndCase &Acoes = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' &WebSession.Remove('WPReceituario_Data') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WPReceituario.Call('', '', false) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMarcar' Do 'MarcaDesmarca' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ddo_Acoes.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_Acoes.ActiveEventKey = !'ArqSiagro' Do 'Do ArqSiagro' Case ddo_Acoes.ActiveEventKey = !'ArqSiagroVenda' Do 'Do ArqSiagroVenda' Case ddo_Acoes.ActiveEventKey = !'Transmitido' Do 'Do Transmitido' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"RctCod", '', !'Código', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"RctNum", '', !'Número', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"RctOciCliCod", '', !'Cliente', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"RctOciCliNom", '', !'Nome', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"RctDta", '', !'Emissão', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"RctNfeNum", '', !'NF-e', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"RctOciCod", '', !'Pedido', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"RctSts", '', !'Status', True, '') &UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'WWReceituarioColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &RctNum1.Visible = False &RctNfeNum1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersRctDta1.Visible = False &RctOciCliCod1.Visible = False &RctSts1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RCTNUM' &RctNum1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RCTNFENUM' &RctNfeNum1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RCTDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersRctDta1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RCTOCICLICOD' &RctOciCliCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RCTSTS' &RctSts1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &RctNum2.Visible = False &RctNfeNum2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersRctDta2.Visible = False &RctOciCliCod2.Visible = False &RctSts2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RCTNUM' &RctNum2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RCTNFENUM' &RctNfeNum2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RCTDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersRctDta2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RCTOCICLICOD' &RctOciCliCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RCTSTS' &RctSts2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &RctNum3.Visible = False &RctNfeNum3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersRctDta3.Visible = False &RctOciCliCod3.Visible = False &RctSts3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RCTNUM' &RctNum3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RCTNFENUM' &RctNfeNum3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RCTDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersRctDta3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RCTOCICLICOD' &RctOciCliCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RCTSTS' &RctSts3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RCTNUM' &RctNum2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RCTNUM' &RctNum3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadSavedFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ManageFiltersData = WWP_ManageFiltersLoadSavedFilters(!'WWReceituarioFilters', !"WWPDynFilterHideAll_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName, False) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'CleanFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &RctFunCod.SetEmpty() &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RCTNUM' &RctNum1.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' Do 'ResetDynFilters' &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Finalizar' &EmpCod = EmpCod &RctCod = RctCod Do 'Validaositensadicionados' If not &HasValidationErrors /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WPFinalizaReceita.PopUp(EmpCod, RctCod, RctNum) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else msg('Atenção! Lançamento dos produtos incompletos verifique!') EndiF EndSub Sub 'Do CancelaReceita' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WPCancelaReceita.PopUp(EmpCod, RctCod, RctNum) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Abrir' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WPAbreReceita.Call(EmpCod, RctCod, RctNum) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ArqSiagro' If &SdtReceituario.Count > 0 GeraArquivoSiagro.Call('R',&SdtReceituario) Else msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Erro!", "Nenhuma receita selecionada, para gerar arquivo. Verifique!" ,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ArqSiagroVenda' If &SdtReceituario.Count > 0 GeraArquivoSiagro.Call('V',&SdtReceituario) Else msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Erro!", "Nenhuma receita selecionada, para gerar arquivo. Verifique!" ,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Transmitido' If &SdtReceituario.Count > 0 AtualizaStatusReceita.Call(&SdtReceituario) Else msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Erro!", "Nenhuma receita selecionada, para gravar status. Verifique!" ,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif Do 'LoadRegFiltersState' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadRegFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"RCTFUNCOD" &RctFunCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RCTNUM' &RctNum1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RCTNFENUM' &RctNfeNum1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RCTDTA' &RctDta1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &RctDta_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RCTOCICLICOD' &RctOciCliCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RCTSTS' &RctSts1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"RCTFUNCOD", "", not &RctFunCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &RctFunCod.ToString().Trim(), '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RCTNUM' AND not &RctNum1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RctNum1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RCTNFENUM' AND not &RctNfeNum1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RctNfeNum1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RCTDTA' AND not (&RctDta1.IsEmpty() AND &RctDta_To1.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RctDta1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &RctDta_To1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RCTOCICLICOD' AND not &RctOciCliCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RctOciCliCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RCTSTS' AND not &RctSts1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RctSts1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RCTNUM' AND not &RctNum2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RctNum2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RCTNFENUM' AND not &RctNfeNum2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RctNfeNum2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RCTDTA' AND not (&RctDta2.IsEmpty() AND &RctDta_To2.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RctDta2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &RctDta_To2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RCTOCICLICOD' AND not &RctOciCliCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RctOciCliCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RCTSTS' AND not &RctSts2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RctSts2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RCTNUM' AND not &RctNum3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RctNum3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RCTNFENUM' AND not &RctNfeNum3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RctNfeNum3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RCTDTA' AND not (&RctDta3.IsEmpty() AND &RctDta_To3.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RctDta3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &RctDta_To3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RCTOCICLICOD' AND not &RctOciCliCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RctOciCliCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RCTSTS' AND not &RctSts3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RctSts3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Receituario" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &ImprimirReceituario.Click RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = ReLJAS150.Link(EmpCod,RctCod) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndEvent Event &Alterar.Click &WizardData.Cliente.EmpCod = EmpCod &WizardData.Cliente.RctCod = RctCod &WebSession.Set('WPReceituario_Data', &WizardData.ToJson()) WPReceituario.link('', 'Cliente', false) EndEvent Event &ActionSelecione.Click If RctSts = Status_Receituario.Finalizado or &Context.TipoPerfil = 3 if &RctSel = true &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) &RctSel = false Else &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &RctSel = true Endif If &RctSel = True &SdtReceituarioItem = new() &SdtReceituarioItem.EmpCod = EmpCod &SdtReceituarioItem.RctCod = RctCod &SdtReceituario.add(&SdtReceituarioItem) Else For &SdtReceituarioItem in &SdtReceituario If &SdtReceituarioItem.RctCod = RctCod &Index = &SdtReceituario.IndexOf(&SdtReceituarioItem) &SdtReceituario.Remove(&Index) Exit EndIF EndFor EndIf do 'GravaSelecionadas' Else Msg('Só é possível realizar marcações em Receitas Finalizadas!' ) EndIf EndEvent Event limpar_campo.Click &SdtReceituario.Clear() do 'GravaSelecionadas' Refresh EndEvent Sub 'IsSelecionado' For &SdtReceituarioItem in &SdtReceituario If &SdtReceituarioItem.RctCod = &AuxRctCod &RctSel = true exit EndIf EndFor EndSub Sub 'loadSelecionados' padraoUsuario.Call('L', 'SEL_WWRECEITUARIO', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) &SdtReceituario.FromJson(&PadObs) do 'Totaliza' EndSub Sub 'GravaSelecionadas' padraoUsuarioHora.Call('G', 'SEL_WWRECEITUARIO', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &SdtReceituario.ToJson(), &PadDtaMod,serverNow(),'T') do 'Totaliza' EndSub Sub 'Totaliza' &numeric = &SdtReceituario.Count receitasSelect.Caption = trim(str(&numeric)) + ' - Receituário Selec.' EndSub Sub 'MarcaDesmarca' For Each using DSwwreceituario(&RctFunCod,&DynamicFiltersSelector1,&RctNum1,&RctNfeNum1,&RctDta1,&RctDta_To1,&RctOciCliCod1,&RctSts1,&DynamicFiltersEnabled2,&DynamicFiltersSelector2,&RctNum2,&RctNfeNum2,&RctDta2,&RctDta_To2,&RctOciCliCod2,&RctSts2,&DynamicFiltersEnabled3,&DynamicFiltersSelector3,&RctNum3,&RctNfeNum3,&RctDta3,&RctDta_To3,&RctOciCliCod3,&RctSts3) defined by RctDta If RctSts = Status_Receituario.Finalizado &IsAchou = false For &SdtReceituarioItem in &SdtReceituario If &SdtReceituarioItem.RctCod = RctCod &IsAchou = true EndIf EndFor If &IsAchou = false &SdtReceituarioItem = new() &SdtReceituarioItem.EmpCod = EmpCod &SdtReceituarioItem.RctCod = RctCod &SdtReceituario.add(&SdtReceituarioItem) EndIf EndIf EndFor do 'GravaSelecionadas' EndSub Sub 'Validaositensadicionados' &HasValidationErrors = True For Each Order EmpCod,RctCod,RctCodItm Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where RctCod = &RctCod Where RctProCod > 0 Where RctProInfCod > 0 Where RctProTlvCod > 0 Where RctProQtdAdq > 0 &HasValidationErrors = false EndFor EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
